cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa.

cards.english: Mr. Pig needs to wear glasses.

cards.characters: 佢要戴咗眼鏡先睇得清楚

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 當豬先生戴咗眼鏡嗰陣
cards.jyutping: dong3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 daai3 zo2 ngaan5 geng2 go2 zan6

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: so2 jau5 je5 dou1 hou2 cing1 co2
cards.english: Everything is very clear.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係當佢除咗副眼鏡落嚟嗰陣
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 dong1 keoi5 ceoi4 zo2 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 lok6 lai4 go2 zan6

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 tai2 je5 zau6 hou2 mou4 wu4 laa3
cards.english: He can't see clearly.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: so2 jau5 je5 tai2 dak1 dou1 wui6 hou2 mung4
cards.english: Everything looks blurry.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 deoi3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 lai4 gong2
cards.english: So, for Mr. Pig,

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 佢一定要知道副眼鏡擺喺邊度㗎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 jat1 ding6 jiu3 zi1 dou3 fu3 ngaan5 geng2 baai2 hai2 bin1 dou6 gaa4

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 豬先生有時會唔見咗副眼鏡
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 jau5 si4 wui6 ng5 gin3 zo2 fu3 ngaan5 geng3
cards.english: Mr. Pig sometimes loses his glasses.

cards.characters: 你哋有冇見過爹哋副眼鏡啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 jau5 mou5 gin3 gwo3 de1 dei6 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa3
cards.english: Have you seen Daddy's glasses?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau1 wai4 wan2 gwo3 dou1 mou5 aa3
cards.english: He's looked everywhere and can't find them.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: mou5 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: No, Mommy.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: tung4
cards.english: Peppa and George

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 唔知道豬先生副眼鏡喺邊喎
cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 dou3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 hai2 bin1 wo3
cards.english: don't know where Mr. Pig's glasses are.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: juk1 caam2 laa3
cards.english: Oh dear!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 爹哋冇咗副眼鏡睇唔到嘢㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 mou5 zo2 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 tai2 m4 dou3 je5 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy can't see anything without his glasses.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 sat6 wui6 hou2 man4 zang1 zek1
cards.english: He'll be so annoyed.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 冇戴眼鏡嗰陣 豬先生根本睇唔到報紙
cards.jyutping: mou5 daai3 ngaan5 geng2 go2 zan6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 gan1 bun2 tai2 m4 dou3 bou3 zi2

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 zan1 hai6 maa4 faan4 laa3
cards.english: This is really troublesome.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 me1 dou1 tai2 m4 dou3 aa3
cards.english: I can't see anything.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 一定係有人 將我副眼鏡擺咗喺第二度
cards.jyutping: jat1 ding6 hai6 jau5 jan4 zoeng1 ngo5 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 baai2 zo2 hai2 dai6 ji6 dou6
cards.english: Someone must have put my glasses somewhere else.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 你記唔記得你將佢放咗喺邊啊？爹哋
cards.jyutping: nei5 gei3 m4 gei3 dak1 nei5 zoeng1 keoi5 fong3 zo2 hai2 bin1 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Do you remember where you put them, Daddy?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 我唔戴嗰陣一定會擺喺袋入面㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 daai3 go2 zan6 jat1 ding6 wui6 baai2 hai2 doi6 jap6 min6 gaa4
cards.english: When I'm not wearing them, I always put them in my bag.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ji4 gaa1 go3 doi6 mou5 wo3
cards.english: But it's not in my bag now.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我哋幫你揾副眼鏡吖
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 bong1 nei5 wan2 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa1
cards.english: Daddy, let us help you find your glasses.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zyu2 ji3 wo3
cards.english: Good idea, Peppa.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: zi2 jiu3 nei5 wan2 dou3 keoi5
cards.english: As long as you find them.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 爹哋就會唔咁忟憎㗎喇
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zau6 wui6 m4 gam3 man4 zang1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Daddy won't be so grumpy.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 di1 dou1 mou5 man4 zang1
cards.english: I'm not grumpy at all.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 tung4
cards.english: Now Peppa and George

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 開始揾豬先生副眼鏡啊
cards.jyutping: hoi1 ci2 wan2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa3
cards.english: are starting to look for Mr. Pig's glasses.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: kit3 hoi1 bou3 zi2 tai2 haa5 haa5 min6
cards.english: Peppa, lift up the newspaper and look underneath.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係豬先生副眼鏡唔喺度喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 m4 hai2 dou6 wo3
cards.english: But Mr. Pig's glasses aren't there.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: zau6 heoi3 din6 si6 ding2 dou3 wan2 haa6
cards.english: George goes to look on top of the TV.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係豬先生副眼鏡都唔喺嗰度喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 dou1 m4 hai2 go2 dou6 wo3
cards.english: But Mr. Pig's glasses aren't there either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 我哋想樓上揾下爹哋同媽咪間睡房吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 soeng2 lau4 soeng6 wan2 haa6 de1 dei6 tung4 maa1 mi4 haan4 seoi6 fong4 aa1
cards.english: We want to go upstairs to look in Daddy and Mommy's bedroom.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: tung4
cards.english: Peppa and George.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 一齊去豬太太同豬先生間睡房揾嘞
cards.jyutping: jat1 cai4 heoi3 zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 haan4 seoi6 fong4 wan2 laak3
cards.english: Go together to Mrs. Pig and Mr. Pig's bedroom to look.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: George，你要小心，唔好撞跌任何嘢啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 siu2 sam1 m4 hou2 zong6 dit3 jam6 ho4 je5 aa3
cards.english: George, you have to be careful, don't knock anything over.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: jat1 di1 dou1 m4 hou2 siu3
cards.english: It's not funny at all!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: wan2 zam2 tau4 dai2
cards.english: Peppa looks under the pillow.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係豬先生副眼鏡唔喺度啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 m4 hai2 dou6 aa3
cards.english: But Mr. Pig's glasses aren't there.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: zau6 wan2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 deoi3 to1 haai2
cards.english: George is looking for Mr. Pig's slippers.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係副眼鏡亦都唔喺入邊喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 jik6 dou1 m4 hai2 jap6 bin6 wo3
cards.english: But the glasses aren't in there either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 heoi3 juk6 sat1 wan2 aa1
cards.english: Let's go look in the bathroom.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: tung4 jat1 cai4 heoi3 juk6 sat1 wan2
cards.english: Peppa and George go to the bathroom together to look.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 副眼鏡唔喺浴缸入邊喎
cards.jyutping: fu3 ngaan5 geng2 m4 hai2 juk6 gong1 jap6 bin6 wo3
cards.english: The glasses aren't in the bathtub.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 副眼鏡亦唔喺座廁入邊
cards.jyutping: fu3 ngaan5 geng2 jik6 m4 hai2 zo6 ci3 jap6 bin6
cards.english: The glasses aren't in the toilet either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: hou2 naan4 wan2 aa3
cards.english: It's so hard to find them.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: tung4
cards.english: Peppa and George

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 揾極都揾唔都豬先生副眼鏡喺邊度啊
cards.jyutping: wan3 gik6 dou1 wan2 m4 dou1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 hai2 bin1 dou6 aa3
cards.english: Can't find Mr. Pig's glasses anywhere.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau1 wai4 dou1 wan2 gwo3 laa3
cards.english: We've looked everywhere.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係都揾唔到爹哋副眼鏡啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 dou1 wan2 m4 dou3 de1 dei6 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa3
cards.english: But we still can't find Dad's glasses.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: juk1 bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh, no!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 dim2 zou6 hou2 aa3
cards.english: What should we do now?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 我諗我要學下唔用眼鏡生活喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 jiu3 hok6 haa6 m4 jung6 ngaan5 geng3 sang1 wut6 laa3

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 只要我慢慢行就唔會撞到嘢㗎喇
cards.jyutping: zi2 jiu3 ngo5 maan6 maan2 hong6 zau6 m4 wui6 zong6 dou3*2 je5 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: As long as I walk slowly, I won't bump into anything.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: hai2 go2 dou6 aa3
cards.english: It's there!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: hai6 de1 dei6 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa3
cards.english: It's Dad's glasses!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Dad!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 原來你一直坐住副眼鏡啊
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 nei5 jat1 zik6 co5 zyu6 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 aa3
cards.english: So you've been sitting on your glasses the whole time.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: gam3 leon6 zeon6 ge2
cards.english: How clumsy can you be?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 點解會走咗去梳化度㗎？
cards.jyutping: dim2 gaai2 wui6 zau2 zo2 heoi3 so1 faa3 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: How did it end up on the sofa?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: hai6 lo1 m4 zi1 dou3 ne1
cards.english: Yeah, I don't know either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 雖然爹哋你今次咁論盡啊
cards.jyutping: seoi1 jin4 de1 dei6 nei5 gam1 ci3 gam3 leon6 zeon2 aa3
cards.english: Although you were clumsy this time, Dad,

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.characters: 但係起碼你唔使再忟憎啦
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 hei2 maa5 nei5 m4 sai2 zoi3 mang2 zang2 laa1
cards.english: At least you don't have to be annoyed anymore.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E9 Daddy Loses His Glasses［爹哋的眼鏡不見了］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 man4 zang1 aa3
cards.english: I'm not annoyed at all.
